title: MT Optimization
description: Maximum game optimization without loss of quality
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/Y3lHw4N.png)

The pack makes it possible to play our favorite game without losing quality, but at the same time getting the maximum possible FPS.

### Lightweight
Modpack does not require a large amount of RAM, I'm not quite sure, but it can potentially run on 1 gigabyte of RAM. 
Modpack will help you run such large projects on 3 gigabytes of RAM - instead of 6 or 8 RAM 

### Performance
The core is Sodium and its add-ons, which are supposed to improve performance.
Even in very busy or difficult areas, the assembly shows good results.

![stats](https://i.imgur.com/q8FYurO.png)
